'''''Firelance''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].

She attempted to destroy the frigate [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']] while being supplied by ''[[Lauhu]]'' as a part of the vengeful Imperial assault after the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. ''Anvil'' managed to escape, but was damaged beyond repair.

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
